note: Fixed probe set — reuse VERBATIM for every future comparison run. Invented cast only (Ruth, Feld, Dana, Boots, Larkspur). Probes sharing a conversation id run in listed order; 'settle' runs background memory jobs after the turn so later probes see settled memory.

probes.text: Tell me about yourself — who are you, and where did you come from?
Could you email my brother Feld an invitation to dinner on Saturday?
What day is it today, and how many days until next Friday?
Great news — Ruth's biopsy came back completely clear. She's in the clear!
And on the same day, of all things — we lost our old cat Boots last night. The girls are taking it hard.
I'm choosing between repainting the fence slate blue or leaving it natural cedar. Any thoughts?
Our standing Friday-night ritual is pizza and a movie with the girls at the Homestead.
Quick note — our standing Friday-night thing is taco night now, not pizza.
What's our Friday-night ritual these days?
What did my sister-in-law Ruth think of the fence color?
Morning. Anything on your mind before we get started?
